Broom of Flying: This wooden broom functions like a mundane broom until you stand astride it and take a Magic action to make it hover beneath you, at which time it can be ridden in the air. It has a Fly Speed of 50 feet. It can carry up to 400 pounds, but its Fly Speed becomes 30 feet while carrying over 200 pounds. The broom stops hovering when you land or when you’re no longer riding it.
head of vox: DJ Vox severed, somewhat preserved head in a bag; preserved by Talon via Magical Tinkering
longbow: Proficiency with a Longbow allows you to add your proficiency bonus to the attack roll for any attack you make with it.
